explanations.2: This pulls a lightweight Python image from Docker Hub—'slim' means it's smaller than the default image by excluding unnecessary files.
explanations.8: The --no-cache-dir flag tells pip not to store downloaded packages locally, which saves disk space in the Docker image.
explanations.16: The --host 0.0.0.0 makes the server listen on all network interfaces (not just localhost), so it can receive requests from outside the container; --port 82 runs it on port 82 instead of the default 8000.
